payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall dark-brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and vertical wood grain; glossy finish shows a central light reflection and minor surface wear; mostly visible but slightly edge-cropped on the right — approximate distance ~0.8 m from camera.

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"tall dark-brown wooden cabinet door","long_description":"Tall dark-brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and vertical wood grain; glossy finish shows a central light reflection and minor surface wear; mostly visible but slightly edge-cropped on the right — approximate distance ~0.8 m from camera.","attributes":["dark brown stained wood","recessed central panel","vertical wood grain","glossy finish with central reflection","rectangular full-height door","minor surface scuffs/wear","slightly cropped at right edge","no visible hardware"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.8}
